name: Elective Carryforward of Unused Volume Cap

eligibility.description: Requires an irrevocable election identifying the specific carryforward purpose (e.g., qualified mortgage bonds, student loan bonds, or redevelopment bonds).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Issuing authorities can elect to carry forward unused private activity bond volume cap for up to 3 years for specific purposes like student loans or redevelopment.
